meta.title: Smith Plumbing | Reliable Plumbers in Cape Town
meta.description: Smith Plumbing — trusted local plumbers serving Cape Town since 2015.

business.name: Smith Plumbing
business.tagline: Reliable plumbing you can trust, right here in Cape Town.

whatsapp.message: Hi, I'd like to get a quote please!

hero.subtitle: From burst pipes to full bathroom renovations, we deliver fast, professional plumbing at fair prices. Trusted by 200+ Cape Town homes and businesses.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive plumbing solutions for homes and businesses across Cape Town.

items.title: Leak Repairs
items.description: Fast detection and repair of leaks in pipes, taps, and fixtures. We minimise water damage and get things flowing properly again.

items.title: Bathroom Plumbing
items.description: Full installations and renovations — from toilets and basins to showers and baths. Clean, professional workmanship every time.

items.title: Geyser Services
items.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of electric and solar geysers. Stay compliant and never run out of hot water.

items.title: Pipe Replacement
items.description: Old, corroded, or burst pipe upgrades using quality materials built to last. We handle copper, PVC, and PEX systems.

items.title: Drain Cleaning
items.description: Blocked drains cleared fast with professional equipment. We tackle kitchens, bathrooms, and outdoor drains.

items.title: Emergency Plumbing
items.description: 24/7 emergency callout for burst pipes, flooding, and sewage backups. Fast response when you need it most.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: About Smith Plumbing
paragraphs: Founded in 2015 by John Smith, a master plumber with 15 years of experience, Smith Plumbing has grown from a one-man operation into Cape Town's most trusted plumbing service.
What sets us apart is our commitment to transparent pricing and clean workmanship. We treat your home like our own — and we always leave it cleaner than we found it.

gallery.label: Our Work
gallery.title: See What We Do
gallery.subtitle: Browse examples of our recent plumbing projects across Cape Town.

testimonials.label: Happy Clients
testimonials.title: What People Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from real customers in Cape Town.

items.quote: John came out within an hour of my call and fixed the burst pipe quickly. Professional, friendly, and very fairly priced. Highly recommended!
Excellent work on our full bathroom renovation. Everything was done on time, on budget, and to a really high standard. Will definitely use again.
Most reliable plumber I've ever used. They show up on time, explain everything clearly, and the workmanship is top-notch. Five stars all round.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to get started?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Contact us today — we'll respond within the hour.
